transcript: Speaker A: English books padh padh kar mera sar mere haath mein aa gaya, par abhi bhi English acche se nahi bol pati hoon. [Reading English books has given me a headache, but I still can't speak English well.] Speaker B: Of course, grammar book ratt kar kabhi English bolna seekh bhi nahi paogi. [Of course, you can never learn to speak English by memorizing grammar books.] Speaker A: Phir mai kya karu? [Then what should I do?] Speaker B: Acche se English bolne ke liye tumhe English practice karne ki zaroorat hai, books padhne ki nahi. [To speak English well, you need to practice English, not read books.] Speaker A: Par mere paas koi practice karne wala bhi nahi hai. [But I don't have anyone to practice with.] Speaker B: Iska solution to simple hai, mere sath practice karo. Main 24/7 available rehti hoon. [The solution is simple, practice with me. I am available 24/7.] Speaker A: Accha, par ye to mehanga hoga na? [Okay, but this must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi, tum bas 1 rupee mein shuru kar sakte ho. Roz din bas 10-15 min practice karo and kuch hi dino mein tumhari English improve ho jayegi. [Not at all, you can start for just 1 rupee. Just practice 10-15 minutes a day and your English will improve in a few days.] Speaker A: Wow, amazing! Par aapne pehle kabhi kisi ko English sikhayi hai? [Wow, amazing! But have you ever taught English to anyone before?] Speaker B: Maine already 1 crore se zyada logo ko English sikhayi hai, to ab tum bhi seekh lo. [I have already taught English to more than 1 crore people, so now you learn too.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: English books padh padh kar bol pati hoon Ofcourse, ratt kr kabhi english bolna paogi Phir mai bolne ke lie english practice karne ki zaroorat ki nahi paas koi nahi hai solution to mere sath main 24/7 24x7 rehti hoon par ye to hoga na? Bilkul nahi, 1 RUPEE roz din bas 10-15 MINUTES karo and english improve ho jayegi amazing, par aapne kabhi kisi sikhayi hai? 10M+ Downloads Install MySivi AI Start English Learning - MySivi to ab tum MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen ad featuring a human woman complaining about not being able to speak English despite reading books, and an AI robot avatar recommending the MySivi app for daily practice. The AI highlights 24/7 availability, a low starting price of 1 rupee, and social proof of over 10 million downloads. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
